title: selaginella tuberculata
intro: Selaginella tuberculata is a type of spore-bearing plant, commonly known as a resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. Traditionally, this plant has been used in medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, Selaginella tuberculata is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
